properties.Test Case: Audio Segmenting: Create a new book, new page, enter 2 sentences. In Talking Book Tool, enable Whole Text Box mode. Break up the sentences with segment markers. Record the page. Now export to spreadsheet. -- Verify that the segment markers are in the spreadssheet
properties.Steps:
Audio Segmenting: Create a new book, new page, enter 2 sentences. In Talking Book Tool, enable Whole Text Box mode. Break up the sentences with segment markers. Record the page. Now export to spreadsheet.
--          Verify that the segment markers are in the spreadssheet
